settings.heading: Get in Touch.
settings.subheading: Questions about your order, custom artwork, or a wholesale inquiry? We usually reply within one business day.

settings.form_body: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you shortly.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale or bulk pricing?
settings.answer: Yes — reach out with your business details and order volume and we'll follow up with pricing.

settings.question: Can I partner with Glass Pads as an artist?
settings.answer: Absolutely — visit our Artist Program page or mention it in your message and we'll follow up.

settings.question: How do I check my order status?
settings.answer: Include your order number above and our team will look into it right away.
